internal/checker/checker.go.reason: Semantic split plan for 31402 LOC TS-Go file. Generated by porter large-files --write-draft; review group boundaries before large-scale implementation.

targets.description: Foundational core Checker methods and constants that the semantic split files depend on: diagnostics sink (addDiagnostic/addSuggestionDiagnostic), serialization level, emit-helper resolution/checks, *Ex type-construction cores, global-symbol merge, and shared queries.
Class, interface, constructor, heritage, visibility, and override semantics.
Checker diagnostics, grammar checks, error construction, and diagnostic attachment.
Control-flow analysis, narrowing, predicates, and definite-state queries.
Generic inference, type parameter constraints, type mappers, instantiation, and variance.
JSX, JSDoc, decorators, and tagged-template checking.
Module, namespace, ambient, package, import/export, and global augmentation checks.
Assignability, comparability, relation checks, identity checks, and excess-property logic.
Call, construct, overload, signature, argument, and return-type checking.
Checker state, enums, cache keys, constructors, package constants, and top-level helpers.
Shared checker queries, caches, predicates, walkers, and small support operations.
General checker support declarations that remain exact-id tracked and must be reviewed before implementation.
Symbol lookup, declarations, names, imports/exports, property/member resolution, and identifier checks.
Syntax-node checking for expressions, statements, literals, functions, and source files.
Type construction, classification, object/union/intersection/tuple types, and apparent/base type operations.

internal/checker/relater.go.reason: relater.go is 5003 LOC, just over the 5000 threshold at this pin. It is currently implemented as the single file relater.ts (the structural assignability/relation/inference engine); this plan documents that monolithic home. Split semantically if the file grows materially.

targets.description: Assignability, comparability, relation/variance checks, inference from types, template-literal inference, and recursion-identity for the structural relation engine.

internal/parser/parser.go.reason: Semantic split plan for 6780 LOC TS-Go file. Generated by porter large-files --write-draft; review group boundaries before large-scale implementation.

targets.description: Parser diagnostics, missing nodes, recovery, and parse-error spans.
Expression, literal, template, and binding-element parsing.
JSX and JSDoc parsing.
List parsing, delimited lists, parameters, arguments, members, and recovery around list terminators.
Parser state, parsing contexts, pools, package constants, and top-level data.
Statement, declaration, source-file, and module-item parsing.
General parser support declarations that remain exact-id tracked and must be reviewed before implementation.
Token consumption, scanner coordination, lookahead, speculation, and context flags.
Type syntax parsing and type-list parsing.

internal/printer/printer.go.reason: Semantic split plan for 6242 LOC TS-Go file. Generated by porter large-files --write-draft; review group boundaries before large-scale implementation.

targets.description: Comment, trivia, detached-comment, directive, and pragma emission.
Core writer, token/list emission, indentation, separators, and node dispatch.
Expression, literal, template, call, member, and operator printing.
Source-map state and source-position emission.
Printer options, state records, write-kind constants, and construction helpers.
Statement, declaration, source-file, and module-item printing.
General printer support declarations that remain exact-id tracked and must be reviewed before implementation.
